summary: Set auth_env_vars to [REVENUECAT_API_KEY, DEVELOPER_BEARER_AUTH] to match config.go env reads and the MCPB manifest env block.
reason: Generator derived a phantom REVENUECAT_BEARER_AUTH (slug+scheme) in auth_env_vars that no generated file reads; config.go reads REVENUECAT_API_KEY (canonical) + DEVELOPER_BEARER_AUTH (title-derived), and the MCPB manifest user_config/env declare those two. The mismatch failed the library MCPB manifest contract check.
